summary: The diff implements all four requirements: Google Sign-In on the Login page (REQ-1), Google Sign-Up on the Signup page (REQ-2), ProfileSetupModal pre-fill props (REQ-3), and Layout/navbar Google user display (REQ-4). All major acceptance criteria appear to be addressed. One minor gap exists: the navbar sign-out option for Google-authenticated users is referenced in the file summary but the Layout.tsx content is truncated, making it difficult to fully verify. The implementation is largely complete with no obvious hallucinated features.
